# v1.3-baseline-flow — golden projection for the SC8 regression guard.
#
# This fixture is a DETERMINISTIC PROJECTION of the v1.3-baseline behaviour,
# NOT a byte-exact log capture. Orchestrator dispatch is non-deterministic
# (specialist message bodies, timestamps, run-ids) so byte-exact diffing
# would be flaky-by-construction.
#
# What we pin:
#   1. Event-type counts (the "what events surfaced" projection).
#   2. The terminal loop status.
#   3. The resolved configuration (loops/cap/auto-approve).
#
# What we DELIBERATELY DO NOT pin:
#   - Free-text bodies (specialist response text).
#   - Timestamps.
#   - Run-ids (each run has a different one).
#   - Memory addresses, line counts, MIME boundaries, etc.
#
# The v1.3 baseline is "no v1.4 flags set". This means:
#   - GUILD_LOOPS unset / --loops not passed → defaults to `none`.
#   - GUILD_LOOP_CAP unset / --loop-cap not passed → defaults to 16 (but
#     with loops=none, the cap is unused).
#   - GUILD_AUTO_APPROVE unset / --auto-approve not passed → defaults to `none`.
#
# Under loops=none, `loops_applicable: "none"` → `activeLayersFor("none")
# returns []` → the loop driver produces ZERO `loop_round_start`/_end
# events, ZERO `escalation` events, ZERO `assumption_logged` events.
# Loop status is "satisfied" (no layers ran; nothing to fail).
#
# This is the v1.3 contract: "no loops" means no loop machinery fires.
# Any v1.4 change that produces non-zero loop events under default flags
# is a regression against SC8.
#
# Format below: one assertion per line in `key=value` form. The test
# parses and checks each.

projection_version=1
loops_resolved=none
auto_approve_resolved=none
event_count_total=0
event_count_loop_round_start=0
event_count_loop_round_end=0
event_count_escalation=0
event_count_assumption_logged=0
loop_status=satisfied
restart_count=0
layers_run_count=0
auto_approved_all=false
